E.C.U Documentation
Get started
  • Home
  • Marketplace
  • ECUs

USM Diag Rev 2.1 (X77, X85)

OBD Information

Protocol: CAN
Send ID: 74D
Recv ID: 76D
Baudrate: 500000
Func Addr: 27
Func Name: UPC

Auto IDents

      },

        "firstbyte": 6,
        "bitoffset": 5,
        "ref": true,
        "endian": "Little"
      },

        "ref": true,

        "endian": "Little"

        "ref": true,
        "endian": "Little"
      },
      "AltLoad_Cnt": {
        "firstbyte": 10,
        "bitoffset": 2,
        "ref": true,
        "endian": "Little"
      }
    }
  },
